title: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
summary: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
whyItMatters: Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology.
